_publications._publicationTitle: The Relationship Between Heart Rate Variability, Psychological Flexibility, and Pain in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: There were no significant associations between HF-HRV and depression (r = −0.14, P = not significant [NS])...pain intensity was not correlated with psychological variables (depression r = −0.05, P = NS
details: No significant association found between depression scores and HF-HRV (r = −0.14, P = NS) or pain intensity (r = −0.05, P = NS)
